prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Vineyard Lies Beneath Us
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: career vs family guilt
Props: casserole dish, blood-adjacent tea towel, scarf with impossible timing

Cast:
- Noah Lark | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.47 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; once left town without explaining why
- Sienna Hale | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.29 | space=storage unit described as just storage | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Gavin Cross | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.44 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Wyatt Lark | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.54 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned
- Luke Pruitt | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.48 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Noah Sutton | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.27 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Jenna Pruitt | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Cole Sutton | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Sienna Hale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Noah Lark says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Sienna?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Jenna. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Noah. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Wyatt."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
